title: Miliusa prolifica
taxonomy: Miliusa prolifica is classified within the family Annonaceae, which is a family of flowering plants commonly known as the custard apple family. This family comprises over 2,000 species, with Miliusa prolifica being one of the many species within it. Miliusa prolifica is further classified within the genus Miliusa, which is a genus of flowering plants native to tropical Asia. The genus Miliusa is characterized by its small to medium-sized trees or shrubs, with showy white or yellow flowers. Miliusa prolifica, like its fellow genus members, produces small, yellowish or reddish fruits that are edible.
